persona_prompt:
You are filtering Boston events for someone who wants high-status, interesting things to attend:
- Oyster happy hours or upscale food/drink (wine dinners, tastings, chef's tables)
- Galas, fundraisers, charity benefits, receptions, award ceremonies
- Events where they can attend as a subject matter expert: public records law, open meeting law, FOIA, government transparency, civic accountability, journalism
- High-status professional networking, panels, policy forums, finance/VC/startup events
- Fashion/model events, runway shows, press events, media events, bikini/swimwear shows, fitness model showcases, promotional model events, brand activations
- Recurring upscale nightlife: scene-y bar/club nights, VIP events, boat/yacht cruises, influencer events
- Anything exclusive, influential, or scene-y

SCORE 9-10 (always attend):
- "Fashionably LATE" Thursdays at The Liberty Hotel — weekly interactive runway, models weave through crowd, free admission
- Boston Fashion Week events (Oct 4-10, 2026) and surrounding pre/post events
- SwimBoston — annual swimwear/bikini runway at Boston Harbor Distillery (21+)
- Boston En Vogue runway shows — luxury evening gowns and couture
- Mass Fashion Week showcases
- Harpoon Brewery festivals (St. Pats, Summer Games at Lawn on D, Oktoberfest)
- Boat/yacht cruises on Boston Harbor — Taylor Swift, Barbie, themed nights
- Any event at Royale Boston, ICON, VENU with 6ONE7 Productions or similar promoters

NOT wanted: pure sports games, road races, youth sports, basic trivia nights at chains.

events.name: VINCENT INGALA
events.description: Declared by Jazziz Magazine as one of the most exciting artists to emerge this past decade, Vincent Ingala remains an unstoppable and ever-adventurous creative force in urban contemporary jazz, with a total of eleven #1 Billboard hits, twenty-three Top 10 singles, and more to come from his latest release and 8th studio album, Escape With Me on Shanachie Entertainment.Upon exploding onto the scene in 2010 with his independent, critically acclaimed debut album North End Soul at the age of 17, Vincent was already a seasoned performer, developing somewhat of a cult following in his home state of Connecticut during his high school years with his compelling one man show. That fan base grew exponentially across the U.S. and in Europe, thanks to supportive on-line outlets with his breakthrough single and Top 15 Billboard track It Is What It Is.Eleven years after the first time he earned Billboards designation as Smooth Jazz Artist of the Year, the saxophonist, multi-instrumentalist, composer, producer and long-beloved entertainer achieved this accolade again in 2023 upon the success of his hit singles Ridin the Wave and Shadow Dancer, the latter of which stayed at #1 on the Smooth Jazz Airplay chart for three weeks.Vincents unique dual ability to electrify fans while connecting emotionally with them has made him one of the genres most popular touring artists. He draws the audience in and makes them part of an exciting musical experience that bridges the gap between the music of his fathers Rs own crisp grooves, well executed horn lines and horn-drenched melodies. Just as he plays every instrument on his self-produced albums, he fronts his explosive band by providing the audience with a well blended show of sax, guitar, drums and vocals. The in-demand recording artist continues to make his mark with a signature music blend of energetic smooth jazz grooves, infused with soulful, old-school retro vibes. His versatility on multiple instruments makes him sought after both live and as a producer in the studio. A wide variety of buffet dinner offerings included if you purchase the buffet-dinner package. Dinner is at 5pm in he Boathouse 400 restaurant, located on the 2nd floor of the hotel. Scullers is located on the ground level of the hotel.. The buffet-dinner packages incude a complimentary glass of house red or white wine, beer or non-alcoholic beverage, as well as compiimentary parking. An 18% gratuity and 7% state tax will be added to your bill. ALL PURCHASES ARE NON-REFUNDABLEIf you require special assistance, please call the box office at 617-562-4111.
events.reason: Vincent Ingala at Scullers—upscale jazz performance with dinner package, wine, smooth jazz credibility, great venue
